title: lepidium × hybridum
intro: Lepidium × hybridum, also known as garden cress, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Lepidium sativum and Lepidium campestre. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Lepidium × hybridum has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, tincture, or capsule, and is often consumed as a fresh green vegetable or added to salads for its peppery flavor.
